steps.title: Identify the starting value
steps.content: At birth, $x=0$, and the seal's length was $148$ centimeters. So the $y$-intercept is $148$.

steps.title: Add the monthly growth
steps.content: The length increases by $5.2$ centimeters per month, so after $x$ months the increase is $5.2x$. The model is: $$ y=5.2x+148 $$ The answer is D.
